Notice And Motion For Dismissal Of Individual Claims With Prejudice And Representative Claims Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RYAN WILLIAMSON's Motion For Dismissal Of Individual Claims With Prejudice And Representative Claims Without Prejudice.

Plaintiff Ryan Williamson's motion for dismissal of individual claims with prejudice and representative claims without prejudice is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The court will sign the previously submitted proposed order.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
